name: Grupo Hidalguense de Desarrollo
name_long: Grupo Hidalguense de Desarrollo, S.A. de C.V
notes:
Mexline operates a resilient network supported by geographically redundant NOCs as part of its ISO 22301 business continuity framework.

We are an eyeball ISP focused on delivering high-quality connectivity and are open to selective peering where mutual benefit exists.

We support peering via IX route servers, private interconnects, and remote peering.
